name: john-adams
description: David McCullough's John Adams — biography toolkit exploring the life of the second US president, his partnership with Abigail, his rivalry with Jefferson, and his role in the American Revolution
useCase: Understand the American Revolution through Adams's eyes, learn from his leadership and mistakes, and draw lessons from his marriage, presidency, and philosophy
knownRisks: McCullough's biography is sympathetic to Adams — not all historians agree with his positive assessment
The book focuses heavily on Adams's personal life and character — readers seeking detailed political analysis may want a different source
Adams owned slaves, though he was personally opposed to slavery — the book does not dwell on this contradiction
